title: Linz, Upper Austria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Linz, Upper Austria: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Linz is a city in Upper Austria with a population of 207,820. A former industrial powerhouse transformed into a cultural and tech hub, home to the Ars Electronica Center, the stunning Lentos Museum, and a vibrant Danube waterfront.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
